zh.lifeSummary: Philip Done於大約1406年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾邱奇 斯特頓。他於大約1431年與Sibilla在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年在英國蘇格蘭斯可迪夏 波德斯阿申吉可享年113歲。

nameMeanings.name: Done
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Alfredo, Angel, Berto, Cristobal, Dinora, Eloisa, Francisco, Generoso, Gustavo, Juan.
English: variant of Donne, itself a variant of Dunn .

variants.name: Dunn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinn, Ó Doinn ‘descendant of Donn’, a byname meaning ‘brown-haired’ or ‘chieftain’. Compare Dunne . This name has sometimes been Anglicized as Brown .
English: nickname for a dark complexioned or swarthy man, from Middle English dun ‘dun, dark’ (Old English dunn ‘dull brown’).
Scottish: habitational name from Dun in Angus, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’. Compare Dun .

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: Philip Done was born about 1406, in Church Stretton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Sibilla about 1431, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1518, in Ashkirk, Scottish Borders, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 113.

fr.lifeSummary: Philip Done est né environ 1406, à Church Stretton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Sibilla environ 1431, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1518, à Ashkirk, Scottish Borders, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 113 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Doneは約1406年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアチャーチ ストレットオンで生まれた。約1431年にイギリスイギリスでSibillaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年にイギリススコットランドスコッティッシュ ボルダースアシュキルクで113歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Done(은)는 대략 1406년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 c후르치 스트레턴에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sibilla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 영국 스코틀랜드 스콧이시 볼더스 애시커크에서 113세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Philip Done родился около 1406 г. в местности чурч стреттон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibilla около 1431 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1518 г. в местности ашкирк, скоттиш бордирс, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 113 лет.
